title: Raccoon Removal in Sunset Park, Brooklyn | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Sunset Park, Brooklyn. Safe, humane trapping and exclusion services starting at $900. Licensed experts serving Sunset Park homes and businesses.
intro: Sunset Park's diverse mix of residential brownstones, multi-family homes, and proximity to Green-Wood Cemetery creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Sunset Park properties from these intelligent, persistent wildlife invaders. We provide humane trapping, exclusion, and prevention solutions tailored to Brooklyn's unique urban environment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in wildlife management throughout Sunset Park, with extensive experience handling raccoon problems in Brooklyn's densely populated neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians understand local building codes and use humane, effective methods to permanently resolve raccoon issues while preventing future infestations.
localContext: Sunset Park's tree-lined streets, older housing stock with accessible attics and chimneys, and the nearby waterfront area provide abundant food sources and shelter for raccoons. The neighborhood's characteristic row houses and multi-unit buildings require specialized exclusion techniques to keep raccoons from entering shared spaces and causing property damage.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Sunset Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Sunset Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Sunset Park, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Sunset Park due to the neighborhood's mature trees, proximity to Green-Wood Cemetery and the waterfront, and older buildings with accessible attics and chimneys. They're attracted to garbage, pet food, and the sheltered spaces found in residential structures.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Sunset Park property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Sunset Park residents. Initial trapping typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. Emergency situations involving aggressive raccoons or babies are prioritized.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Brooklyn humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all NYC and New York State regulations for humane wildlife removal. Our methods include live trapping and relocation when permitted, one-way exclusion devices, and habitat modification. We never use poison or inhumane techniques, and all work complies with local wildlife management laws.
